Up Only Fund — machine-readable summary
========================================

Name: Up Only Fund
Tagline: Onchain Capital for High Conviction Bets
Focus: Solana allocator with 80/20 thesis—80% high-conviction utility tokens, 20% clean onchain memecoins with verified liquidity. Published mandate, portfolio disclosures, and $UPONLY liquid sleeve.

What this site is
-----------------
Up Only Fund is an independent allocator brand with a published mandate and conviction-based allocation thesis. It is not financial advice or a guarantee of returns.

Where to follow
---------------
- X: https://x.com/uponly_fund
- Telegram: https://t.me/uponly_fund

App routes (typical)
--------------------
- / — fund landing (marketing, mandate, portfolio, thesis)
- /terminal — command dashboard / terminal layout
- /overview — markets overview
- /market, /wallet, /simulator, /insights, /create-token — dashboard modules

Social post studio (ship log) lives on Syra at https://syraa.fun/post — not on this site.

Set the public origin for metadata with VITE_PUBLIC_SITE_ORIGIN (see src/config/site.ts).
